existing_analysis.generated_baseline_summary: Aonla flipped from BJP to SP in 2024. BJP vote share changed by -7.3 points and INC vote share changed by -5.9 points compared with 2019. The 2024 margin was 1.5%. This is a descriptive election profile, not a causal explanation.
existing_analysis.generated_electoral_movement: Available data indicates Aonla flipped from BJP to SP between 2019 and 2024. BJP vote share changed by -7.3 percentage points versus 2019. INC vote share changed by -5.9 percentage points versus 2019. The winning margin moved from 10.8% in 2019 to 1.5% in 2024. Turnout changed by -4.1 percentage points between 2019 and 2024. This section describes observed election movement only and is not a causal explanation.
existing_analysis.generated_demographic_context: Demographic indicators are currently unavailable for this constituency; the profile is election-only.
existing_analysis.generated_district_context: District-linked demographic mapping details are not available for this seat.
existing_analysis.generated_what_to_watch: Monitor whether the 2024 seat change stabilizes in future cycles. The 2024 margin was narrow and may suggest a highly competitive seat profile. Demographic context may remain limited until district-linked coverage improves.
existing_analysis.final_summary: Aonla flipped from BJP to SP in 2024. BJP vote share changed by -7.3 points and INC vote share changed by -5.9 points compared with 2019. The 2024 margin was 1.5%. This is a descriptive election profile, not a causal explanation.
existing_analysis.final_electoral_movement: Available data indicates Aonla flipped from BJP to SP between 2019 and 2024. BJP vote share changed by -7.3 percentage points versus 2019. INC vote share changed by -5.9 percentage points versus 2019. The winning margin moved from 10.8% in 2019 to 1.5% in 2024. Turnout changed by -4.1 percentage points between 2019 and 2024. existing_analysis.final_what_to_watch: Monitor whether the 2024 seat change stabilizes in future cycles. The 2024 margin was narrow and may suggest a highly competitive seat profile. Demographic context may remain limited until district-linked coverage improves.

writing_prompts.what_happened_prompt: Describe observed 2019→2024 election movement for Aonla, Uttar Pradesh using winner, vote-share, margin, and turnout fields only.
writing_prompts.why_it_mattered_prompt: Explain why Aonla may be analytically useful using priority reason (seat_flip), contest closeness, swings, and state context.
writing_prompts.factors_prompt: List only cautious factors such as candidate profile, alliance arithmetic, state-level swing, turnout movement, or limited demographic coverage.
writing_prompts.demographic_prompt: Summarise available NFHS-linked indicators and district mapping. If unavailable, state that the profile remains election-only.
writing_prompts.what_to_watch_prompt: Use forward-looking but non-predictive language about seat stability, swing consolidation, and coverage improvements.
writing_prompts.caveat_prompt: State that local causal explanations require further source review.
